title: [BUG] npm warn
author: OnePiecesjc
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

npm warn deprecated lodash.isequal@4.5.0: This package is deprecated. Use require('node:util').isDeepStrictEqual instead.
npm warn deprecated rimraf@2.7.1: Rimraf versions prior to v4 are no longer supported
npm warn deprecated fstream@1.0.12: This package is no longer supported.

comments.author: s-light
comments.body: extended version of this is in #2921

comments.author: anders8
comments.body:
At least part of this looks easy to handle:
```
├─┬ exceljs@4.4.0
│ └─┬ unzipper@0.10.14
│   └─┬ fstream@1.0.12
│     └── rimraf@2.7.1 deduped
```

the rimraf, which is what the complaint is about, is coming from fstream, but the latest unzipper no longer uses fstream. so updating unzipper dependency to the latest version should quiet down some warnings
